name: laravel-ai
description: Build Laravel AI agents, tools, and Vercel AI SDK streaming integrations.

interface.shortDescription: Build Laravel AI agents, tools, and chat streams
interface.longDescription: Create Laravel AI agent tools for read, write, and interactive workflows, then stream Laravel agents to Vercel AI SDK React clients with provider routing, attachments, session-lock handling, and post-stream hooks.
defaultPrompt: Add tools to this Laravel AI agent.
Stream this Laravel agent to a Vercel AI SDK client.
